ddls:
CREATE TABLE "digital_assets" (
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each digital asset */,
  "upload_file_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the uploaded file */,
  "related_id" INTEGER /* ID of the related entity (e.g., writer, article) */,
  "related_type" TEXT /* Type of related entity */,
  "field" TEXT /* Field or category of the digital asset (e.g., picture, image) */,
  "order" INTEGER /* Order of the digital asset within a collection */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the digital asset */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category of the digital asset */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the type of the digital asset */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the digital asset */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the asset */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the asset */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the asset was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the asset was last updated */,
  "thumbnail_id" INTEGER /* ID of the thumbnail image for the asset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("asset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_digital_assets_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES asset_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_digital_assets_related_id FOREIGN KEY ("related_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_digital_assets_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES asset_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_digital_assets_related_id FOREIGN KEY ("related_id") REFERENCES writers ("writer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_digital_assets_upload_file_id FOREIGN KEY ("upload_file_id") REFERENCES upload_files ("upload_file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_digital_assets_thumbnail_id FOREIGN KEY ("thumbnail_id") REFERENCES upload_files ("upload_file_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "upload_files" (
  "upload_file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each uploaded file */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* Name of the uploaded file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the uploaded file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* MIME type of the file */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the file on the server */,
  "checksum" TEXT /* Checksum to ensure data integrity */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the file */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the file was uploaded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the file was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("upload_file_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "writers" (
  "writer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each writer */,
  "writer_name" TEXT /* Name of the writer */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biography of the writer */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the writer's entry */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the writer's entry */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the writer's entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the writer's entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("writer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "articles" (
  "article_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each article */,
  "article_title" TEXT /* Title of the article */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the article */,
  "writer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the writer associated with the article */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category of the article */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the article */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the article */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the article was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the article was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_articles_writer_id FOREIGN KEY ("writer_id") REFERENCES writers ("writer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_articles_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES asset_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "asset_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the category */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the category was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the category was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_asset_categories_parent_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_id") REFERENCES asset_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "asset_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the type */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category associated with the type */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the type */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the type was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_asset_types_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES asset_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "asset_orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the digital asset */,
  "collection_id" INTEGER /* ID of the collection */,
  "order" INTEGER /* Order of the digital asset within the collection */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the order */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the order */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the order was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the order was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_asset_orders_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id") REFERENCES digital_assets ("asset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_asset_orders_collection_id FOREIGN KEY ("collection_id") REFERENCES collections ("collection_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collections" (
  "collection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collection */,
  "collection_name" TEXT /* Name of the collection */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the collection */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the collection */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the collection */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the collection was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the collection was last updated */,
  "private" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the collection is private */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collection_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, contributor) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user last logged in */,
  "status" TEXT /* User account status (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the digital asset being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the digital asset */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the digital asset was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the asset */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the asset */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access event occurred */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id") REFERENCES digital_assets ("asset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
